steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: ”Because of this, data-privacy advocates are seeking to expand online players' knowledge” reveals that games are hiding or obscuring information about their data practices.

steps.title: Match the required meaning
steps.content: Opaque means “unclear” or “non-transparent” — exactly what describes games that hide information about data collection. The other choices either describe emotional attitudes, suggest hostility, or imply transparency. That matches choice A — A is correct.
